name: AnnualReport
description: A USCIRF annual report documenting international religious freedom conditions and providing policy recommendations to the U.S. government.

report_year.description: Year of the annual report publication.

title.description: Full title of the annual report.
title.example: 2026 Annual Report of the United States Commission on International Religious Freedom

cpc_countries.description: Countries recommended for Country of Particular Concern designation.

swl_countries.description: Countries recommended for the Special Watch List.

epc_entities.description: Non-state actors recommended for Entity of Particular Concern designation.

countries_assessed.description: Total number of countries assessed in the report.

report_url.description: URL to access the full annual report.

pdf_url.description: Direct URL to the PDF version of the annual report.

key_themes.description: Major thematic findings or focus areas for the reporting year.
